CONSENT TO ELECTRONIC DELIVERY OF INITIAL DISCLOSURE DOCUMENTS

To open an account in Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan using an e-signature, you must consent (by tapping “I agree”) to receive the initial disclosure documents electronically. If you do not tap "I agree", you may not open your account using an e-signature. You consent and agree:

To receive the following documents electronically and acknowledge having reviewed, printed, or otherwise received them:

Arkansas Brighter Future 529 Plan Description and Participation Agreement

Privacy Policy

Business Continuity Plan Policy

Please be aware of the following:

  • To view and print the documents online, you'll need Adobe Acrobat Reader. If you don't have Acrobat Reader, go to www.adobe.com, where you can download it for free.
  • If you're unable to download, view, and print the documents, or you do not consent to electronic delivery, you cannot submit your application using an e-signature. Contact Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan at 1-800-587-7301 for assistance or to request a paper copy of any of these documents.
  • The Program does not charge you a fee to use our Web site, but you could incur expenses from your Internet service provider when you access information online. Also, be aware that your Internet service provider may occasionally experience system failure, and hyperlinks to documents may not function properly.

Adobe Website

This election and consent applies only to the documents listed above.

IMPORTANT: YOU ARE ENTERING INTO A CONTRACT TO ESTABLISH AN ACCOUNT IN Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan. CERTAIN IMPORTANT LEGAL RIGHTS AND RESPONSIBILITIES ARE DESCRIBED BELOW. PLEASE READ CAREFULLY AND CALL 1-800-587-7301 IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS.

Authorization—YOU MUST SIGN BELOW

By tapping “I agree”, I hereby apply for an account in the Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan Program. I certify that:

  • I have received the Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan Program Description and Participation Agreement, which contain the Privacy Statement of Ascensus College Savings Recordkeeping Services, LLC and its affiliates that provide services to the Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan. I understand that the Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan may from time to time amend the Program Description and Participation Agreement, and I agree that I will be subject to the terms of those amendments by signing this Enrollment Form. I understand that the Enrollment Form shall be construed, governed, and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the State of Arkansas.
  • Except as set forth below, I understand that the Program Description and Participation Agreement constitute the entire agreement between the account owner and the Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan. No person is authorized to make an oral modification to this agreement.
  • I understand that I may incur federal and state income and penalty taxes as a consequence of certain activities, including terminating my account or changing my Designated Beneficiary to an ineligible person. (Account Owners should seek advice from a qualified tax advisor).
  • I understand that contributions to the Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan are not insured and that, except to the extent of Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) insurance available for the Savings Portfolio, the investment returns are not guaranteed by the FDIC, the Arkansas Section 529 Plan Review Committee (the "Committee"), the State of Arkansas, its agencies or any instrumentality thereof, the federal government, or any other government or government agency, Ascensus College Savings Recordkeeping Services, LLC., The Vanguard Group, Inc. for the underlying funds in the Plan, or their respective affiliates. I understand that contributions will be invested under the direction of the Committee and there is no assurance that the accounts under the Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan will generate any specific rate of return; in fact, there is no assurance that the account will not decrease in value.
  • If I have chosen the automatic investment or electronic funds transfer option, I authorize the Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan and Ascensus College Savings Recordkeeping Services, LLC, upon telephone or online request, to pay amounts representing redemptions made by me or, to secure payment of amounts invested by me, by initiating credit or debit entries to my account at the bank designated in this Enrollment Form. I authorize the bank to accept any such credits or debits to my account without responsibility to their correctness. I acknowledge that the origination of ACH transactions involving my account must comply with U.S. law. I understand that this authorization may be terminated by me at any time by notifying the Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan and Ascensus College Savings Recordkeeping Services, LLC, and the bank by telephone or in writing, and that the termination request will be effective as soon as the Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan, Ascensus College Savings Recordkeeping Services, LLC., The Vanguard Group, Inc., and their respective affiliates have had a reasonable amount of time to act upon it. I understand and agree that all transaction requests placed for my account are my sole responsibility and are at my sole risk. I further agree that the Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan, Ascensus College Savings Recordkeeping Services, LLC., The Vanguard Group, Inc., and their respective affiliates will not be liable for any loss, cost, or expense to me when they act upon instructions reasonably believed to be genuine. I acknowledge that if an AIP or EFT contribution can't be processed because the bank account on which it is drawn contains insufficient funds or incomplete or inaccurate information, the Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan reserves the right to suspend processing of future AIP or EFT contributions I certify that I have authority to transact on the bank account identified by me in this Enrollment Form, and I confirm that the registrations on such bank accounts and my Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan account meet the requirements set forth above.
  • I certify that the information provided on this Enrollment Form — and all future information I will provide with respect to my accounts — is true and accurate and that I am bound by the terms, rights, and responsibilities stated in this agreement and by any and all statutory, administrative, and operating procedures that govern the Arkansas Brighter Future Direct Plan.
  • I understand that tapping “I agree” is the legal equivalent to submitting a document signed by hand, and indicates that I agree to the terms of this Enrollment Form.

Effective Date: November 2020

Thank you for using READYSAVE™ 529, a mobile application developed and operated by Ascensus. As used herein, “Ascensus” means Ascensus College Savings Recordkeeping Services, LLC, and its affiliates, collectively. The state administrator (“State Administrator”) for your 529 college savings program (“Program”) has contracted with one or more of the Ascensus entities to provide certain administration services for the Program. For the purposes of these Mobile Terms of Use, each user of READYSAVE™ 529 is referred to as “you” or “your,” as applicable. Through this application, Ascensus is providing READYSAVE™ 529 to you.

Intellectual Property

READYSAVE™ 529 is the downloadable mobile application software which enables you to log-in to your Program from your mobile device. READYSAVE™ 529 and its original content, features and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of Ascensus and, as applicable, its licensors. Your use of READYSAVE™ 529 shall be limited solely to your access and use of the Program. READYSAVE™ is protected by copyright, trademark, and other laws of the United States. Our trademarks and trade dress may not be used in connection with any product or service without the prior written consent of Ascensus.

Termination

Ascensus may terminate or suspend your access to READYSAVE™ 529 immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever and without limitation, including but not limited to a breach of the Mobile Terms of Use.

All provisions of these Mobile Terms of Use which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination, including, without limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity and limitations of liability.

Indemnification

You agree to defend, indemnify and hold harmless Ascensus and its licensors, and their employees, contractors, agents, officers and directors, from and against any and all claims, damages, obligations, losses, liabilities, costs or debt, and expenses (including but not limited to attorney's fees), resulting from or arising out of a) your use and access of READYSAVE™ 529 in breach of these Mobile Terms of Use.

Limitation of Liability

In no event shall Ascensus, or its directors, employees, agents, or affiliates, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from (i) your access to or use of or inability to access or use READYSAVE™ 529; (ii) any conduct or content of any third party on READYSAVE™ 529; (iii) any content obtained from READYSAVE™ 529; and (iv) unauthorized access, use or alteration of your transmissions or content, whether based on warranty, contract, tort (including negligence) or any other legal theory, whether or not we have been informed of the possibility of such damage, and even if a remedy set forth herein is found to have failed of its essential purpose.

Disclaimer

Your use of READYSAVE™ 529 is at your sole risk. READYSAVE™ 529 is provided on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis. READYSAVE™ 529 is provided without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, including, but not limited to, implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, non-infringement or course of performance. Ascensus and, as applicable, its affiliates and/or licensors do not warrant that a) READYSAVE™ 529 will function uninterrupted, secure or available at any particular time or location; b) any errors or defects will be corrected; c) READYSAVE™ 529 is free of viruses or other harmful components; or d) the results of using READYSAVE™ 529 will meet your requirements or expectations.

Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion of certain warranties or the exclusion or limitation of liability for consequential or incidental damages, so the limitations above may not apply to you.

Biometric Authentication Service (if applicable)

The “Biometric Authentication Service” refers to a feature that allows you to use this mobile device’s biometric authentication feature (such as fingerprint or face recognition) stored on the mobile device to access READYSAVE™ 529 instead of entering your Username and Password. The Biometric Authentication Service is only available to participants who are authorized users with registered accounts on your Program website and have downloaded READYSAVE™ 529, using a mobile device with a biometric authentication recognition feature enabled ("Applicable Device").

By enabling the Biometric Authentication Service, you understand and accept that the biometric information stored on your Applicable Device can be used to access READYSAVE™ 529. Accordingly, you agree and accept that:

a. the authentication performed by READYSAVE™ 529 is done by interfacing with the biometric authentication fingerprint recognition and authentication feature that is installed on this mobile device, and you agree to such authentication process taking place;

b. you are aware that the biometric information is only stored on this Applicable Device and will not be accessed or stored by, or provided to READYSAVE™ 529;

c. you can deactivate the Biometric Authentication Service at any time by changing the settings on READYSAVE™ 529 once you are signed in;

d. each time READYSAVE™ 529 detects the use of certain biometric information that is registered on this Applicable Device to access READYSAVE™ 529, you will be deemed to have accessed READYSAVE™ 529 and to have instructed the Program to perform any and all actions and transactions carried out during each session using the Applicable Device;

e. you should ensure that only your biometric information is stored on this Applicable Device. If persons other than yourself have their biometric information registered as part of the biometric authentication recognition software registered in this Applicable Device, you understand, agree and accept that such persons will be able to access READYSAVE™ 529, including access to your account(s) and your account information, and all actions and transactions carried out by such persons shall be deemed to be carried out by you, or otherwise authorized by you;

f. you are solely responsible for taking all reasonable, adequate and appropriate measures to protect and secure your Applicable Device from unauthorized use and unauthorized users, and shall be fully responsible for all use of your Applicable Device (whether authorized by you or otherwise) access and use of READYSAVE™ 529; and

g. if you become aware of, or believe there has been, any breach of security of your Applicable Device or any unauthorized use or access to READYSAVE™ 529 stored on your Applicable Device, you must deactivate the Biometric Authentication Service immediately and immediately call your Program or email our Participant Services Team at AscensusFraud@ascensus.com. If you fail to notify Ascensus promptly and such delay results in losses to you, you agree that Ascensus will have no liability for such losses.

Governing Law

These Mobile Terms of Use shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of Delaware, United States, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Mobile Terms of Use will not be considered a waiver of those rights. If any provision of these Mobile Terms of Use is held to be invalid or unenforceable by a court, the remaining provisions of these Mobile Terms of Use will remain in effect. These Mobile Terms of Use constitute the entire agreement between us regarding READYSAVE™ 529, and supersede and replace any prior agreements we might have had between us regarding READYSAVE™ 529.

Changes

We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Mobile Terms of Use at any time. If a revision is material, we will provide at least 30 days’ notice prior to any new terms taking effect. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.

By continuing to access or use our READYSAVE™ 529 after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use READYSAVE™ 529.
